TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Myawan, title = Myawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Myawan} }

S.FORM: alang Myawan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 162 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 82%, Amis 5%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Myawan hya' ga Tmunan. tay mkyahu' na Myawan hya' ga Branaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Myawan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 162 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 82%, Amis 5%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Myawan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Myawan hya' ga Tmunan. tay mkyahu' na Myawan hya' ga Branaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mjawan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mjawan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na mjawan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mjawan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na mjawan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na mjawan ħjaʔ ɣa tmunan. taj mkjaħuʔ na mjawan ħjaʔ ɣa βranaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
